event.title: FSFE Vienna local group meeting in Vienna, Austria

body.p: Revival of the local group meeting in Vienna. Supporters of the Free Software Foundation Europe and interested people will meet to discuss current topics, socialize and have a nice evening together.

We meet on the 26th of March, 18:30 in the Metalab hackspace, Rathausstraße 6, 1010 Vienna. No registration needed, no fees, all interested people are welcome. There will be a presentation in English about Free Software, which will also be held at PyCon Austria 2026. The intention is to gather feedback, while also being a nice introduction for new people. After the presentation, we'll gauge how much interest there is to meet regularly, which topics there are to serve as a basis for further meetings and just chat and exchange ideas and experiences.
